subject: Swift-BAT trigger 296491 is not a GRB
body:
J. Cummings (GSFC/ORAU), C.B. Markwardt (CRESST/GSFC/UMD), S.D. Barthelmy (GSFC)
on behalf of the Swift-BAT team:

The Swift-BAT trigger (trigger=296491) at 14:51:39 UT on 12 Nov 07,
tentatively labelled GRB 071112A (GCN 7057, Stratta et al.),
is not due to a GRB or any other astrophysical source.  This trigger
is due to a noisy detector.
